english_text: AYATUL KURSI — colored teaching tile with multiple English translations of the Throne Verse's clauses (the Ever-Living, the Ever-Watchful; neither slumber nor sleep overtakes Him; He knows what is BEFORE and AFTER; etc.)
alt_text: Color-blocked teaching tile of Ayatul Kursi (Quran 2:255) with each clause's translation tagged by color and English summary. Low resolution but recognizable as the standard Throne Verse decomposition.
notes: Ayatul Kursi (Quran 2:255) — full verse decomposition into ~8 clauses.
